name: ABM Target Account Monitoring
description: Know which of your named accounts are warming up, which just went cold, and which quietly converted to pipeline this week.
alsoSurfaces: Which target accounts changed status in the last 7 days?
Which accounts went cold and what was the last touch?
How many target accounts moved into pipeline this week?
beforeWeRun: Target list — all-tiers or specific tier?
Heat thresholds — 6sense intent score, or custom?

whatYoullGet.name: Heat KPIs
whatYoullGet.desc: Accounts warming, accounts cooling, new pipeline entries this week.

whatYoullGet.name: Movement table
whatYoullGet.desc: Accounts whose state changed, sorted by significance.

whatYoullGet.name: Pipeline-entry list
whatYoullGet.desc: Accounts that converted from target to pipeline.

whatYoullGet.name: Cold-account list
whatYoullGet.desc: Previously-engaged accounts that have gone silent.

whatYoullGet.name: Drill-down
whatYoullGet.desc: Click any account for the full signal feed.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your ABM monitoring dashboard in ~9 min.
